name: Adreana's Greek Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces feta cheese, drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken in water that covers it with 1 bay leaf. Bring to a boil and cook for 30 minutes or until juices are clear.
2. Remove the cooked chicken from the water and allow it to cool. Peel off the skin (or cook the chicken in a frying pan until fully cooked, then cut into bite-sized pieces).
3. Cook the rotini according to package instructions and drain well.
4. Add the cooled chicken, chopped celery, red bell pepper, black olives, feta cheese, and green onions to the drained pasta.
5. Mix well using only about half of the Italian salad dressing. The remaining dressing can be placed on the table for those who wish to add more.
6. Serve warm or cold. This recipe serves 6 people.
